text:
Created attachment 213336
diff file for port update

Update openvpn-devel port to the 2020-W15 snapshot:

* 05229fb5 2020-04-07 | OpenSSL: Fix --crl-verify not loading multiple CRLs in one file (HEAD -> master-2020-15, origin/master, origin/HEAD, master) [Maxim Plotnikov]
* e23fb6b8 2020-04-03 | Fix off-by-one in tls-crypt-v2 client wrapping with custom metadata [Arne Schwabe]
